query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS materiais_divulgacao (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  centralArgumentos TEXT,
  promocaoVigente TEXT,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS materiais_diversos (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  titulo VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  descricao TEXT,
  tipo VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  conteudo TEXT NOT NULL,
  ordem INT DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS materiais_promotores (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  promotorId INT NOT NULL,
  titulo VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  conteudo TEXT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

INSERT INTO materiais_divulgacao (centralArgumentos, promocaoVigente) VALUES ('', '') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id=id;
